question: Will Donald Trump and Xi Jinping meet in person before April 3, 2026?
resolution_criteria: Trump and Xi hold a confirmed in-person meeting

predictions.reasoning: The resolution date (April 3, 2026) has already passed. Multiple confirmed sources show the meeting was rescheduled from March to May 14-15, 2026, well after the deadline. No evidence of any in-person meeting before April 3. The Polymarket 52% likely reflects a differently-worded question or longer timeframe. Metaculus at 10% is closer but still too high. Near-certain NO, leaving 3% for unknown/unreported meetings.
The meeting originally scheduled for late March/early April was officially postponed and rescheduled for May 2026.

The likelihood of a meeting depends heavily on Trump winning the 2024 US presidential election; if he wins, diplomatic norms suggest a high chance of an in-person meeting with Xi Jinping, but if he loses, such a meeting becomes much less probable due to reduced influence and formal channels.
